Variables.Name: PS_CameraEffectNonExtremeContent_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: The effect to use for non extreme content

Variables.Name: BaseCamera
Variables.Description: Camera this emitter is attached to, will be notified when emitter is destroyed

Variables.Name: RelativeTransform
Variables.Description:
Effect-to-camera transform to allow arbitrary placement of the particle system .
	  Note the X component of the location will be scaled with camera fov to keep the lens effect the same apparent size.

Variables.Name: BaseFOV
Variables.Description: This is the assumed FOV for which the effect was authored. The code will make automatic adjustments to make it look the same at different FOVs

Variables.Name: bAllowMultipleInstances
Variables.Description: true if multiple instances of this emitter can exist simultaneously, false otherwise.

Variables.Name: bResetWhenRetriggered
Variables.Description: If bAllowMultipleInstances is true and this effect is retriggered, the particle system will be reset if this is true

Variables.Name: EmittersToTreatAsSame
Variables.Description:
If an emitter class in this array is currently playing, do not play this effect.
	   Useful for preventing multiple similar or expensive camera effects from playing simultaneously.
